# CampusGarh — India's Most Trusted Student Platform
> CampusGarh helps students discover colleges, compare courses, and get unbiased admission guidance across India.

## What we offer
- College discovery with verified data, fees, placements, and NAAC ratings
- Course listings: UG, PG, Diploma, Doctorate across all disciplines
- Entrance exam guides: JEE, NEET, CAT, CLAT and 50+ more
- Genuine student reviews and ground-level campus reports
- Free counselling and college comparison tools

## Key pages
- https://campusgarh.com/ — Home
- https://campusgarh.com/colleges — Browse all colleges
- https://campusgarh.com/courses — Browse all courses
- https://campusgarh.com/exams — Entrance exams
- https://campusgarh.com/blogs — News & articles
- https://campusgarh.com/about — About CampusGarh
- https://campusgarh.com/engineering-colleges — Engineering colleges
- https://campusgarh.com/medical-colleges — Medical colleges
- https://campusgarh.com/management-colleges — Management colleges
- https://campusgarh.com/law-colleges — Law colleges

## Data freshness
College data is updated regularly from official sources and verified student reports.

## Contact
- Website: https://campusgarh.com
- Contact: https://campusgarh.com/contact
